summary: Cross-screen data wiring complete. Platform fully functional end-to-end. Two env vars pending on your side to flip into production.

lanes.label: Needs You
lanes.hint: 5-min Vercel env changes — no code from me

lanes.label: Backlog
lanes.hint: Queued — I build these next, no input needed

items.title: Set CRON_SECRET in Vercel
items.note: Unlocks /api/sim/* + daily auto-populate cron + /admin/sim demo button. Any random string.

items.title: Set CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY + CLERK_SECRET_KEY
items.note: Turns on sign-in gates. Free app at clerk.com. Then I ship per-role RLS.

items.title: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN (optional)
items.note: Error tracking + session replay. App runs fine without it.

items.title: Apple Developer + Google Play accounts
items.note: Only for EMT app store builds — month 3, not blocking the pitch.

items.title: ePCR signature capture
items.note: Canvas signature pad — submit blocked until signed; PNG stored on claim + vitals + audit event.

items.title: Provider crew roster
items.note: crew_members table (540 seeded, 2/unit) + roster on /providers/[id] with role/cert/unit/shift/phone.

items.title: Provider onboarding wizard
items.note: Company info, fleet upload, crew bulk-add, contract upload.

items.title: Per-role RLS bound to Clerk JWT
items.note: Replaces dev-permissive RLS. Blocked until CLERK_* is set.

items.title: Real M-Pesa / AfyaLink / KRA adapters
items.note: Stubs work now. One-file swap each when vendor creds land.

items.title: Mobile offline-first queue
items.note: Queue writes when offline, sync on reconnect.

items.title: Background GPS reporting
items.note: Expo TaskManager — unit position every 10s on a job.

items.title: Storybook for packages/ui
items.note: Visual component review surface.

items.title: Live HTML Kanban tracker
items.note: This board — auto-refreshing, cards flash green as they move lanes.

items.title: Cross-screen data consistency
items.note: PSAP→dispatch→EMT→claims share one Supabase pool. Same patient/diagnosis everywhere.

items.title: NACDState aligned to v2 schema
items.note: Writes/reads use complaint/icd11/lat/lng + claims table. Was silently failing.

items.title: Screens hydrate shared pool from DB
items.note: seedIncidents:0 — every screen loads the same incidents on init.

items.title: Multi-tab leader election
items.note: Only one tab drives the sim — no write storm with N tabs open.

items.title: EMT ePCR → claim + vitals + clear
items.note: Submit mints claim, writes vitals, clears incident, frees unit.

items.title: Supervisor actions persist
items.note: whisper/barge/flag_qa/takeover → supervisor_actions + audit log.

items.title: Hospital accept/divert wired
items.note: Divert raises a supervisor approval at /admin/pending.

items.title: Claims workflow + SHIF tariff
items.note: List, detail, approve, bulk, CSV, PDF, M-Pesa/AfyaLink/KRA stubs.

items.title: Dispatch console + Mapbox
items.note: Queue, assign nearest unit, route, clear, ETA HUD.

items.title: PSAP triage + create incident
items.note: MPDS protocol, geocoder, caller/patient form → realtime.

items.title: LED wall dashboard
items.note: Map, KPI rail, hot incidents, fleet/calls/agents, P1 alarm.

items.title: Providers list + detail
items.note: Fleet roster, invoicing, revenue rollups per operator.

items.title: Admin suite
items.note: Users, hospitals, audit log, feature flags, pending approvals, sim controls.

items.title: /api/sim/demo replay
items.note: 10-second scripted PSAP→claim→M-Pesa→KRA with live narration.

items.title: Heartbeat cron + leader spawn
items.note: Keeps the active-incident pool alive continuously.

items.title: Cmd+K command palette
items.note: Search incidents/claims/units/hospitals/providers + jump to any app.

items.title: Expo mobile EMT app
items.note: Unit picker, incident card, status flow, vitals, push scaffold, Maps deep links.

items.title: PWA install for /emt
items.note: Installable on any phone without Expo.

items.title: Public /status dashboard
items.note: Uptime, DB latency, throughput, env config check.

items.title: CI + synthetic monitor
items.note: Typecheck+test+build on push; E2E smoke every 30 min. Green on Node 22.

items.title: Vitest + Playwright suites
items.note: 31 domain unit tests + 9 E2E smoke tests.

items.title: Architecture + 4 runbooks
items.note: deploy, rollback, incident-response, scaling.

items.title: Sentry + Vercel Analytics wired
items.note: No-op until DSN set; Speed Insights live.

items.title: v1 MVP UI restored
items.note: All 10 operational screens serve the original pixel-perfect prototypes.

items.title: App switcher fixed
items.note: Material Symbols display=block + inline 9-app rail.
